content: TASK-069 checkpoint done: Prototype map routing now rejects routes that pass behind/through other screen cards. After the perpendicular source/target stubs are generated, each candidate route is checked against all non-endpoint flow-map cards with padding; if it intersects another card, the renderer chooses an outside top/bottom/left/right lane candidate with the fewest component hits and shortest length. Prototype map margins were increased so outside lanes are less likely to clip. Verification: npm run typecheck, npm test -- --run test/prototype.test.ts (9 tests, dense sample still covered), and npm run build passed. TASK-056 performance remains open; dense Prototype render still takes ~2s in the targeted test.
